name: Poulet En Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and dry the chicken; skewer neck skin to back; twist wing tips flat against the skewered neck skin; tie the legs to tail with kitchen string.
2. Heat oil and butter or margarine in a 12-cup flameproof casserole or large kettle with minced garlic until hot. Brown the chicken in the hot fat, then remove.
3. Sauté onions, potatoes, and carrots in drippings until tender. Remove vegetables and reserve. Stir wine, salt, rosemary, and pepper into the casserole and bring to a boil, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom of the casserole. Stir in chicken broth; return chicken and reserved vegetables to the casserole; cover.
4. Bake in a moderate oven (350°F) for 1 hour, basting several times with casserole juices, or until chicken is tender. Garnish with parsley and serve with a chilled white wine such as Chablis and chunks of crusty French bread if desired. Serves 4.
